title: Minecraft OG Edition
description: Do you want play to Minecraft 1.20.1 with old features ?
body:
### THIS MOD IS IN BETA !!!

# What is this mod ?

### What if every old minecraft ore, block, weapons, armor, structures, even myths comeback in the lasts Minecraft versions ? With this mod, all of that is possible !

**Old blocks/items/features which are back :**

- Old ore, ingot and there block : Coal, Iron, Gold, Lapis-Lazuli, Redstone, Diamond, Emerald, even ruby ?
- Old natural block : Stone, Cobblestone, Gravel, Obsidian, Water and Lava
- Old weapons : Stone to Diamond weapons
- Old armor : Chain to Diamond armor
- Old structures : Minecraft Villager House
- Old food : Steak, Golden Carrot, Golden Apple, Enchanted Golden Apple
- Old woods : Oak and Spruce Log, Leaves, Planks, Stairs, Slab, Pressure plates, Door, Trapdoor, Button, Fences, Fence gates, Sapling (only for Oak for the moment)
- Old feature : Old right click with a sword (without animation for the moments)
- Old Biome : Plain

**New blocks/items :**

- Glitched Block
- Ruby (ore, block, ingot)
- Clock of the time (normal and break)

## **USEFUL INFORMATION BEFORE YOU START !!!**

- To get old blocks, you need to do a right click on a block (doesn't work with doors and every blocks that don't have an old version)
- To get old items, you need to put your item(s) that you want to transform in your left hand and do a right click in the air
- To get a clock of the time, you need 4 ruby (new ore old), 2 gold (new ore old), 1 diamond (new or old) and 2 leather

![Craft to get a clock of the time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cec377e69d4c10c7b2242327110029a6e1f7eff.png)
- **A clock have 64 durability**
- To repair a broken clock, you need 4 ruby (old or new) and your watch (to use into a crafting table)

![Craft to repair your clock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fa052f678efece291614181ab3bcd323331e681.png)
- **Ruby spawn between y = 10 and y = -5**
- Old ore spawn only in old biomes
- You have 1 chance in 1024 to get an apparition of the Glitched Block in using your clock. If it happens, you clock will break instantly
